rationale: In the citing paper, Thomas (2001) appears only as part of a grouped parenthetical list in the conclusion of studies said to assume independence in customer behavior components. The paper does not discuss Thomas (2001) in detail, does not borrow its acquisition-retention methodology, and does not use it as a direct basis for model specification or empirical implementation. Because the reference functions as a broad prior-example citation rather than a distinct input to the article's core argument, the citation role is mention-level.
